creator: swell.k@gmail.com
text:
Doh, looks like ARCH_X86_64 is not defined on amd64.

Hmm, doesn't build here
  $ uname -vm
  FreeBSD 9.0-CURRENT #0: Sat May  8 00:15:09 UTC 2010     holo@raphael.local:/a/objdir/a/dirty_build/sys/PHOENIX  amd64

  $ make
  ...
  libtool: compile:  cc -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I. -I../.. -I../../include -I../../lib -I../../include -I../../lib -DDATADIR=\"/home/holo/aaa/share/directfb-1.4.3\" -DMODULEDIR=\"/home/holo/aaa/lib/directfb-1.4-0\" -D_REENTRANT -pthread -I/usr/pkg/include -O3 -ffast-math -pipe -O2 -pipe -O3 -march=native -fno-strict-aliasing -D_GNU_SOURCE -Werror-implicit-function-declaration -MT interface.lo -MD -MP -MF .deps/interface.Tpo -c interface.c  -fPIC -DPIC -o .libs/interface.o
  interface.c:74:48: error: 'PTHREAD_RECURSIVE_MUTEX_INITIALIZER_NP' undeclared here (not in a function)
  gmake[3]: *** [interface.lo] Error 1

then

  cc -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I. -I.. -I../lib -I../include -I../include -I../lib -I../src -DDATADIR=\"/home/holo/aaa/share/directfb-1.4.3\" -D_REENTRANT -pthread  -I/usr/pkg/include  -O3 -ffast-math -pipe -O2 -pipe -fno-strict-aliasing -D_GNU_SOURCE  -Werror-implicit-function-declaration -MT dfbmaster.o -MD -MP -MF .deps/dfbmaster.Tpo -c -o dfbmaster.o dfbmaster.c
  dfbmaster.c: In function 'main':
  dfbmaster.c:58:6: error: implicit declaration of function 'sigemptyset'
  dfbmaster.c:60:6: error: implicit declaration of function 'sigsuspend'
  gmake[2]: *** [dfbmaster.o] Error 1

after a successfull build and deinstall

  ===>   Deinstalling directfb-1.4.3
  pkg_delete: file '/home/holo/aaa/lib/directfb-1.4-0/inputdrivers/libdirectfb_x11input.a' doesn't exist
  pkg_delete: file '/home/holo/aaa/lib/directfb-1.4-0/inputdrivers/libdirectfb_x11input.la' doesn't exist
  pkg_delete: file '/home/holo/aaa/lib/directfb-1.4-0/inputdrivers/libdirectfb_x11input.so' doesn't exist
  pkg_delete: file '/home/holo/aaa/lib/directfb-1.4-0/inputdrivers' doesn't exist
  pkg_delete: unable to completely remove directory '/home/holo/aaa/lib/directfb-1.4-0/inputdrivers'

based on DirectFB-1.{1.1,4.3}/systems/x11/Makefile.am diff I think the
functionality is now inside libdirectfb_x11.{so,a}.

Built cairo and gtk with directfb support:
  gtk->directfb->x11 -- or was it sdl->x11? well, it works, tested on apvlv and gtk-demo
  gtk->directfb->sdl->vgl -- works, tested on gtk-demo

--- a.diff begins here ---
Index: devel/directfb/Makefile
===================================================================
RCS file: /a/.cvsup/ports/devel/directfb/Makefile,v
retrieving revision 1.37
diff -u -p -r1.37 Makefile
--- devel/directfb/Makefile	28 Mar 2010 06:33:02 -0000	1.37
+++ devel/directfb/Makefile	9 May 2010 01:45:14 -0000
@@ -21,6 +21,7 @@ OPTIONS=	FREETYPE2	"Enable Freetype supp
 		X11		"Enable X11 backend" On \
 		SDL		"Enable SDL backend" On
 
+CONFIGURE_TARGET=${ARCH:S/amd64/x86_64/}-portbld-freebsd${OSREL}
 CONFIGURE_ENV=	CPPFLAGS="${PTHREAD_CFLAGS}" LDFLAGS="${PTHREAD_LIBS}"
 USE_AUTOTOOLS=	libtool:22
 USE_SDL=	sdl
Index: devel/directfb/pkg-plist
===================================================================
RCS file: /a/.cvsup/ports/devel/directfb/pkg-plist,v
retrieving revision 1.7
diff -u -p -r1.7 pkg-plist
--- devel/directfb/pkg-plist	30 May 2008 21:23:40 -0000	1.7
+++ devel/directfb/pkg-plist	9 May 2010 01:37:02 -0000
@@ -123,9 +126,6 @@ include/directfb/fusion/vector.h
 %%SDL%%lib/directfb-%%DIRECTFB_VER%%/inputdrivers/libdirectfb_sdlinput.a
 %%SDL%%lib/directfb-%%DIRECTFB_VER%%/inputdrivers/libdirectfb_sdlinput.la
 %%SDL%%lib/directfb-%%DIRECTFB_VER%%/inputdrivers/libdirectfb_sdlinput.so
-%%X11%%lib/directfb-%%DIRECTFB_VER%%/inputdrivers/libdirectfb_x11input.a
-%%X11%%lib/directfb-%%DIRECTFB_VER%%/inputdrivers/libdirectfb_x11input.la
-%%X11%%lib/directfb-%%DIRECTFB_VER%%/inputdrivers/libdirectfb_x11input.so
 lib/directfb-%%DIRECTFB_VER%%/interfaces/IDirectFBFont/libidirectfbfont_default.a
 lib/directfb-%%DIRECTFB_VER%%/interfaces/IDirectFBFont/libidirectfbfont_default.la
 lib/directfb-%%DIRECTFB_VER%%/interfaces/IDirectFBFont/libidirectfbfont_default.so
Index: devel/directfb/files/patch-lib-direct-interface.c
===================================================================
RCS file: devel/directfb/files/patch-lib-direct-interface.c
diff -N devel/directfb/files/patch-lib-direct-interface.c
--- /dev/null	1 Jan 1970 00:00:00 -0000
+++ devel/directfb/files/patch-lib-direct-interface.c	9 May 2010 01:18:10 -0000
@@ -0,0 +1,12 @@
+--- lib/direct/interface.c~	2010-05-09 05:13:00.356403771 +0400
++++ lib/direct/interface.c	2010-05-09 05:17:20.548433379 +0400
+@@ -51,6 +51,9 @@
+ #include <dlfcn.h>
+ #endif
+ 
++#if !HAVE_DECL_PTHREAD_RECURSIVE_MUTEX_INITIALIZER_NP
++#define PTHREAD_RECURSIVE_MUTEX_INITIALIZER_NP 0
++#endif
+ 
+ D_DEBUG_DOMAIN( Direct_Interface, "Direct/Interface", "Direct Interface" );
+ 
Index: devel/directfb/files/patch-tools-dfbmaster.c
===================================================================
RCS file: devel/directfb/files/patch-tools-dfbmaster.c
diff -N devel/directfb/files/patch-tools-dfbmaster.c
--- /dev/null	1 Jan 1970 00:00:00 -0000
+++ devel/directfb/files/patch-tools-dfbmaster.c	9 May 2010 01:25:07 -0000
@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+--- tools/dfbmaster.c~	2010-05-09 05:24:27.290367417 +0400
++++ tools/dfbmaster.c	2010-05-09 05:24:37.846754467 +0400
+@@ -27,11 +27,12 @@
+ 
+ #include <config.h>
+ 
++#include <signal.h>
++
+ #include <direct/messages.h>
+ 
+ #include <directfb.h>
+ 
+-
+ int
+ main( int argc, char *argv[] )
+ {
--- a.diff ends here ---
